summary: Tested 3 new features in workout-detail.tsx: (1) Week X of 4 Banner, (2) Week Picker Modal, (3) Rest Days in Weekly Blueprint. Also tested new PATCH /api/workout/{id}/week-override backend endpoint. All 10 feature requirements PASS. 12/13 backend tests pass (1 minor: no 404 for invalid workout ID in week-override endpoint).

minor.issue: No validation that workout ID exists — returns 200 instead of 404 for nonexistent IDs. update_one without matched_count check.

action_items: (Optional) Add workout existence check to PATCH /api/workout/{id}/week-override: check result.matched_count and raise 404 if 0
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/workout/{id}/week-override does no existence check — silently succeeds for unknown workout IDs. Should check matched_count.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used pre-existing workout ID 13879b5a-82d5-4fa1-8c68-a7e1a999b750. Week override was set to 2, 4, and 1 during testing, then reset to null via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Week banner / modal / rest days feature is fully working. Backend week-override endpoint is functional but lacks 404 for unknown IDs. Test workout ID 13879b5a-82d5-4fa1-8c68-a7e1a999b750 used; week_override reset to null after testing.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no critical bugs found. Minor: PATCH /api/workout/{id}/week-override calls update_one but does not check result.matched_count, so patching a nonexistent workout ID returns 200 instead of 404. Fix: add `if result.matched_count == 0: raise HTTPException(404, 'Workout not found')` after the update_one call.
